ksa_text: Implement data security controls and access management measures to protect personal and sensitive data across systems and applications.

dcwf.top_element_label: Serve as technical expert and liaison to law enforcement personnel and explain incident details as required.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge case — included on balance: task contains GOV-relevant signals ("access   :policy|control|management|governance|review|rights", "sensitive data") within a Security & Privacy context (affinity 0.55). STRM composite is moderate-to-strong (0.4080). A manager-level AI Governance Professional would encounter this competency in governance practice.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External check: no matches in governance job postings or certification curricula (CDMP, DAMA, IAPP CIPP/CIPM, NIST AI RMF, ISO 42001). Would a working AI Governance Professional self-report this as a required competency?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Challenge answered: the governance competency is implicit in AI Governance Professional practice (domain affinity 0.55, 2 GOV signal(s)). Framework vocabulary matching underrepresents many legitimate governance competencies.
